name: Sant Climent
description: A quiet hamlet within the municipality of Maó, on the road towards Cala en Porter, with basic amenities. Its hallmark is the jazz concerts held at its casino throughout the year, a cultural fixture.

highlights: a quiet rural village in the countryside of Maó
the Casino de Sant Climent, a bar-restaurant with jazz sessions
a stop on the way to Cala en Porter and the south coast
